title: Your Gut Controls Your Hormones After 40: Here Is Why It Matters
seo_title: Gut Hormone Connection Women Over 40: Why It Matters
meta_description: Your gut microbiome regulates estrogen, cortisol, and serotonin. Discover how the gut-hormone connection affects women over 40 and what to do to restore balance.
tags: gut health, hormones, estrobolome, women over 40, microbiome, probiotics, gut-brain axis
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: The gut microbiome directly controls how estrogen, cortisol, and serotonin are produced and metabolized in women over 40. A disrupted gut can drive hormonal imbalances, mood swings, and weight changes that feel impossible to explain.
